reviews.review_title: Like this demo the full vers for Quest 2
reviews.review_description:
23 Jul 2025: Yes the full version also works now for the good oldie VR quest 2 thanks the team for taking time 

....  2 Mar 2025 :  i like to try out and love it but then i see,
it working on the quest 2 but just this demo great done but the full version only works on a quest 3 headset.
tricky think but meta say quest 2 works for some years in the future but there will be no new games working anymore because devs also need time to make i understand it and just make it working for quest 3 headsets ;-(( so we can only play old games on quest 2

developer_response.body:
Hello McCoreBe 
The full game is now available on Meta Quest2 ! 
Sorry it took us a few weeks to optimize it : we spend a lot of time to fine tune it .... I hope you will enjoy it  

Thank you ! 
Best, 
Alexandre- Gamedesigner on Detective VR

reviews.review_description: Highly recommend this demo! There are many cool mechanics based on your hand gestures, and I also like the transition VFX between the virtual and real spaces. The drawing board's layout looks really cool and attractive. I'm excited to see more and more scenarios to explore there in the future!

developer_response.body:
Hello 
Thank you so much for your review,
 I'm glad you enjoyed the Detective Board gameplay ! 

I have a great news 🚀 The full game is available ! 🥳
It is 4 to 6 hours of gameplay

DETECTIVE VR page : https://www.meta.com/experiences/detective-vr/9146074265423412/


Good investigation 
All the best, 
Alex - gamedesigner of Detective VR

reviews.review_description:
Looks like a great game, can’t wait for the full release!
Great concept, may need to translate the text from French to English and other languages.
Will definitely keep my eyes open for this one.

developer_response.body:
Hi Carajuk,
Thank you so much for your review ! The full game is available, I hope you'll enjoy it . 
It is 4 to 6 hours of gameplay (with French and English voice-over)

DETECTIVE VR page : https://www.meta.com/experiences/detective-vr/9146074265423412/


Good investigation 
All the best,
Alex - gamedesigner of Detective VR

reviews.review_description: Interesting game that shows what you can do with AR and some imagination. Looking forward to solving the finished storyline
